title: Delivery and Shipping Terms
intro: We are committed to delivering your order quickly, safely, and conveniently. Below are the main delivery terms.

deliveryTimeframes.title: Delivery Timeframes
deliveryTimeframes.description: Delivery timeframes depend on the type of order, delivery location, and selected delivery method.
deliveryTimeframes.typical: Orders are usually delivered within 1-3 business days, depending on product availability and the delivery address.
deliveryTimeframes.delayNotice: In case of possible delays, our team will contact you in advance and inform you about the new delivery timeframe.

deliveryOptions.title: Delivery Options
deliveryOptions.description: We offer the following delivery options:

items.standard: Standard delivery, carried out by us or through partner delivery services.
items.express: Express delivery, available for an additional fee depending on the address and order type.
items.pickup: Self-pickup, available if this option is applicable to your order.

deliveryFees.title: Delivery Fees
deliveryFees.description: The delivery fee may depend on the order amount, delivery location, and selected delivery method.

items.freeThreshold: For purchases of 8000 AMD or more, delivery may be free of charge.
items.yerevanFee: For purchases below 8000 AMD, delivery within Yerevan costs 1000 AMD.
items.regionalFee: Delivery fees to regions are calculated separately depending on the delivery address and service terms.

deliveryFees.checkoutNotice: The final delivery fee is displayed during the order checkout process.

orderConfirmation.title: Order Confirmation
orderConfirmation.description: After placing an order, our team may contact you to confirm the order details, delivery address, payment method, and product availability.
orderConfirmation.electronicsNotice: For phones and electronic devices, some orders may require additional confirmation to avoid incorrect orders or inaccurate information.

productInspection.title: Product Inspection Upon Delivery
productInspection.description: Please check the following when receiving the product:

items.serialNumber: IMEI or serial number compliance with the documents, if applicable.

possibleDelays.title: Possible Delays
possibleDelays.description: Despite our efforts, delivery may be delayed in some cases due to the following reasons:

items.address: incorrect delivery address or contact details.

specialNote.title: Special Note
specialNote.description: Please make sure to correctly fill in your phone number, delivery address, and other required information when placing an order. Incorrect or incomplete information may extend the delivery timeframe.
specialNote.returnNotice: After receiving the product, the return or exchange process is regulated by the terms of our “Return and Exchange Policy” section.
